name: @forwardimpact/libcoaligned
description: Co-Aligned architecture checks — enforce instruction-layer length caps and JTBD invariants across the repo.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Editing a CLAUDE.md or skill procedure and realizing the layer has quietly grown past its budget.
jobs.bigHire: enforce instruction-layer length caps and JTBD invariants without hand-rolling repo checks.
jobs.littleHire: verify a docs change before commit and trust the layered architecture has not drifted.
jobs.competesWith: ad-hoc shell scripts; eyeballing word counts; tolerating slow drift in the instruction architecture
